query:
SELECT 'evidences' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM evidences WHERE id = 120040
UNION ALL
SELECT 'evidence_files', COUNT(*) FROM evidence_files WHERE evidenceId = 120040
UNION ALL
SELECT 'evidence_texts', COUNT(*) FROM evidence_texts WHERE evidenceId = 120040;
